data.text: the act of preparing food for eating especially by heating: the act of cooking food
examples: I do most of the cooking for our family.
a technique used in French cooking
Do you like my cooking?

data.text: a manner of preparing food: cuisine
examples: I do most of the cooking for our family.
a technique used in French cooking
Do you like my cooking?
I do most of the cooking for our family.
a technique used in French cooking
Do you like my cooking?
bought some cooking apples
cooking techniques
Cooking time is about 30 minutes.

data.text: to prepare (food) for eating by a heating process
examples: Cook the vegetables over low heat for 10 minutes.
The fish was cooked in a wine sauce.
He cooked dinner for his guests.
The point is that every country's numbers are the result of a specific set of testing and accounting regimes. Everyone is cooking the data, one way or another.
Agents discovered a recipe for cooking meth at his lab …
We're too busy to cook tonight.
I enjoy cooking for friends.
The rice is cooking now.
She tried to find out what was cooking in the committee.
The jazz quartet was cooking along.
The party cooked right through the night.

examples: Cook the vegetables over low heat for 10 minutes.
The fish was cooked in a wine sauce.
He cooked dinner for his guests.
The point is that every country's numbers are the result of a specific set of testing and accounting regimes. Everyone is cooking the data, one way or another.

data.text: an aerosol that contains vegetable oil for spraying on cookware to prevent food from sticking
food that is cooked at home or is similar to food cooked at home
examples: … the lunchtime special … pays homage to his grandparents' simple home cooking …
… an antacid may save the day if that roadside diner doesn't live up to its "home cooking" claims.

data.text: to make one's failure or ruin certain
to fire as a result of overheating
to alter official accounting records in order to deceive or mislead
examples: Congress cooked the books with phony spending cuts and accounting gimmickry to appear to reduce the federal deficit.
